privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic benchmark task for testing data entry capabilities. The survey 'Community Health Needs Assessment 2024' is programmatically created with 5 questions: QZIP (short text), QHEALTH (multiple choice with options Excellent/Very good/Good/Fair/Poor using codes EX/VG/GD/FR/PR), QDAYS (numeric), QINSURED (yes/no/don't know using codes Y/N/DK), and QAGE (numeric). The task requires entering 3 specific responses with ZIP codes 02101/90210/60601, health ratings GD/FR/VG respectively, physical health days 5/12/0, insurance coverage Y/N/Y, and ages 42/67/31. All metadata answer code mappings and expected response values have been verified against the setup script and task description.
